# nxos_telemetry (Data Source)

This data source can read the streaming telemetry configuration on NX-OS devices, including destination groups, sensor groups, subscriptions, and their relationships.

### API Documentation

- [telemetryEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:Entity/)
- [telemetryDestGroup](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:DestGroup/)
- [telemetryDest](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:Dest/)
- [telemetrySensorGroup](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:SensorGroup/)
- [telemetrySensorPath](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:SensorPath/)
- [telemetrySubscription](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:Subscription/)
- [telemetryRsSensorGroupRel](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:RsSensorGroupRel/)
- [telemetryRsDestGroupRel](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Streaming%20Telemetry/telemetry:RsDestGroupRel/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nxos_telemetry" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `admin_state` (String) The administrative state of the object or policy.
- `batch_dme_events` (Boolean) DME events batching is enabled or disabled.
- `destination_groups` (Attributes Map) Destination Group.
  - Map key: `id` - Destination group ID. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_groups))
- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.
- `merge_subscriptions` (Boolean) Subscriptions merging enabled or disabled.
- `sensor_groups` (Attributes Map) Sensor Group.
  - Map key: `id` - Sensor group identifier. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sensor_groups))
- `subscriptions` (Attributes Map) Subscription.
  - Map key: `id` - Subscription identifier.
  - Key range: `1`-`4095` (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscriptions))

<a id="nestedatt--destination_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_groups`

Read-Only:

- `destinations` (Attributes Map) Destination.
  - Map key format: `<address>;<port>`
  - Key component `address`: Destination IP address.
  - Key component `port`: Destination port number. Range: `0`-`65535`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_groups--destinations))

<a id="nestedatt--destination_groups--destinations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_groups.destinations`

Read-Only:

- `encoding` (String) Destination encoding type.
- `node_id` (String) Destination node Identifier.
- `protocol` (String) Destination protocol type.



<a id="nestedatt--sensor_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sensor_groups`

Read-Only:

- `data_source` (String) Data source for this sensor group.
- `sensor_paths` (Attributes Map) The DME/Open-Config/Device-Yang/Usability path.
  - Map key: `path` - The path to the monitored data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sensor_groups--sensor_paths))

<a id="nestedatt--sensor_groups--sensor_paths"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sensor_groups.sensor_paths`

Read-Only:

- `alias` (String) The alias of the en-coding path.
- `depth` (Number) The number of levels of managed objects retrieved (For path property value == Usability path only level 0 is valid value).
- `filter_condition` (String) The condition(s) for filtering the queried notifications.
- `query_condition` (String) The condition(s) for retrieving notifications.



<a id="nestedatt--subscriptions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscriptions`

Read-Only:

- `destination_group_relationships` (Attributes Map) Link to destGroup entry.
  - Map key: `target_dn` - Target distinguished name of the destination group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscriptions--destination_group_relationships))
- `sensor_group_relationships` (Attributes Map) Link to sensorGroup entry.
  - Map key: `target_dn` - Target distinguished name of the sensor group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscriptions--sensor_group_relationships))

<a id="nestedatt--subscriptions--destination_group_relationships"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscriptions.destination_group_relationships`


<a id="nestedatt--subscriptions--sensor_group_relationships"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscriptions.sensor_group_relationships`

Read-Only:

- `sample_interval` (Number) Sensor sample inteval.
